steps.title: Substitute the x-value
steps.content:
The second equation gives $x=1$. Substitute that into the first equation:
$$y=2(1)+3$$

steps.title: Find the point
steps.content:
Evaluate the expression:
$$y=5$$
So the solution point is $(1,5)$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph both equations as written and read their intersection point. The answer is B.
